name: whiteboard.readCanvas
description: Read the current state of a whiteboard canvas. Returns an LLM-friendly summary including shape count, text content of all elements, and connection info. Agents should use this to understand what is on the board before adding new content.

room_id.description: Whiteboard room ID to read (optional, uses session)

format.description: Output format: 'summary' returns an LLM-friendly digest with shape list and connections; 'raw' returns the full tldraw JSON canvas. Defaults to 'summary'.

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session)

org_id.description: Organization ID for multi-tenant context (optional, uses session)

canvas.description: Canvas data — shape summary (if format=summary) or full tldraw JSON (if format=raw)
